removeGMSecrets.name: Hidden secrets for all PLAYERS
removeGMSecrets.hint: Removes hidden secrets from exported journal text for all PLAYERS.

returnHTMLtext.name: HMTL text
returnHTMLtext.hint: Returns the HTML Foundry saves and seen in the editor instead of plain text.

isCuratedText.name: Curated Text export
isCuratedText.hint: Returns curated text. This means that block elements will create linefeeds and style the text export to be similar to what you see in the journalk.

isEmptyLineText.name: Remove empty lines
isEmptyLineText.hint: Removes any empty lines in the text. If you want to keep them for styling do not use this option.

isPageTitle.name: Include Page Title.
isPageTitle.hint: This will add the page title to the exported text.

returnMDtext.name: Render to Markdown
returnMDtext.hint: Renders the text of a journal page to markdown before clipboard export.

outputFormat.name: Output format
outputFormat.hint: The output format for the clipboard. Markdown will not be rendered by the Foundry rendere.

allowLimited.name: 'Limited rights' export
allowLimited.hint: Allows for the export of pages which have the 'limited' user right flag. Caution! this migth be very system specific.

isSecretObsidianCallout.name: Secret as Callout
isSecretObsidianCallout.hint: Returns Obsidian style Markdown callouts with the callout denominator '[!secret]' for secrets

isDetailsTagObsidianCallout.name: 'Details' tag as Callout
isDetailsTagObsidianCallout.hint: Returns Obsidian style Markdown callouts with the callout denominator '[!note]' for HTML details tags.

isBlockQuoteObsidianCallout.name: Blockquote as Callout
isBlockQuoteObsidianCallout.hint: Returns Obsidian style Markdown callouts with the callout denominator '[!info]' for blockquotes.

secretsForGM.name: Hide Secrets for GM
secretsForGM.hint: Toggles the export of hidden secrets for the GM.

htmlStyleTag.name: Style CSS
htmlStyleTag.hint: Copy and paste any CSS you want to use for the html export here (without style tags). It will be added at the start of the html.

picturePathSearchFor.name: IMG path to replace
picturePathSearchFor.hint: Enter the string of the IMG path you want to search and replace for. Like for example the Foundry path 'assets'. Leave empty if not replacements shall take place.

picturePathReplaceWith.name: IMG path to be replaced with
picturePathReplaceWith.hint: This is the IMG path you want to replace with. For example 'D:\Foundry14.363\Data\assets'. Leave empty if not replacements shall take place.

htmlFooter.name: HTML Footer
htmlFooter.hint: HTML Footer will be added at the end of the exported html. You need to include any tags you need.

htmlHeader.name: HTML Header
htmlHeader.hint: HTML Header will be added at the top of the exported html. You need to include any tags you need.

base64PictureExport.name: Export pictures in HTML
base64PictureExport.hint: Export pictures as base64 encoded data included as inline html. As long as this option is set no URL adjusment will be made. Instead the whole picture URL will be replaced by the picture.

outputChannel.name: Export Destination
outputChannel.hint: To which destination the exportet text shall be exported to. Standard is the clipboard.

fileName.name: Filenamen
fileName.hint: Please input ONLY the file name and NO file path for the file export option.

notifications.noJournalOpen: No currently opened or active journal window.
notifications.print: Journal has been sent to the printer.

warning.onlyOneAllowed: Only Markdown or HTML can be active at the same time. Switched to plain text export.
